description: Session token replay: captures the session token from session A, terminates session A, then replays the token in a new connection. A properly bound server must reject the replayed token.

probes.description: Establish session A and capture session token
Replay captured token in new connection — must be rejected

assertions.description: Replayed session token must be rejected

remediation: Session tokens must be cryptographically bound to the transport connection. Implement DPoP (RFC 9449) or TLS channel binding. Revoke session tokens immediately on session termination. Reject any token presented on a new connection that was issued for a different connection.
